emails.subject: FW: The Chase Manhattan Bank - EOL
emails.body: FW: The Chase Manhattan Bank EOL Both of you are listed in Lotus Notes on this one. Not sure who has had most recent contact. I someone working on a no-confirms agreement for Chase already?

emails.subject: RE: The Chase Manhattan Bank - EOL
emails.body: RE: The Chase Manhattan Bank EOL Mark: You never assigned this one. Attached is the EOL list. Chase merged with JP Morgan and we need to upgrade/select existing master.
